text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Phew… All right. Taaaaact? You there?

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
I am! Are you finished changing…? 
I'm ready to see, so please, come on out.

text_block_list.name: Tact and Bouquet
text_block_list.text: Whoooooaaaa!!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: You are beautiful as always, Heart-san!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
I agree…! 
I knew bright and showy colors would fit you the best!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
You picked that outfit out the second we got to the store, didn't you, 
Tact-chan?♪ You seemed REALLY confident when you did, too.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I look good, don't I? 
I'm still on a roll, so let me go try on a different color.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ohh! Blue looks good on you, too! 
Your energy's totally different, but it's still great! 
You get a gold star!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Mmhm! And for your accessories, what do you think of this? 
A yellow accent would go perfectly with that outfit ♪

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
I think it would be lovely. Oh, I also want to be sure we can see 
her footwork clearly… Flight-senpai, do you think we could 
tailor it to clean up her silhouette?

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Of course I would! 
You have a really clear vision in mind, don't you!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
She really does. 
…Really, she knows me all too well.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Now that Heart-san's outfit is… more or less decided? 
Next in line is Tact-san.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
R-Right! Er… I cannot stress this enough… Bouquet-san, Bakushin 
O-senpai, Flight-senpai, thank you all so much for your assistance.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No problem! Helping underclassmen is what a class representative's 
supposed to do! Besides, we were going to be here anyway 
to pick up our tailored outfits!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
I also planned to come here to choose the dresses 
the committee will rent out. So please, you 
do not need to thank us.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All right, now it's your turn to pick something out, Tact-san! 
Do you have anything in mind!?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Something sharp!? Something schwing!? 
Or maybe even something swoosh!?

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Sch- Swoosh…? 
Oh, well, I…! 
Let's see…

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my—— This outfit fits you quite well. There is an air of calm 
about it—— I think it goes perfectly with how you present 
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Although… I worry that wearing bright colors will 
distract from Heart-san. Hmm…

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Mm! A deep blue is real chic! Love it! If you put it under the 
light of the event hall, I bet it would look as elegant as the stars 
in the night sky!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
The rich tones of the gold buttons stand out too! You're already 
really refined, and they make you look even more put together.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Mmhm! What you said! 
I think you look chic and rich and tappy and poppy too!!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
D- do I really? 
I- I see…

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hmm… I'm sorry, but you can't fool my special Class Rep Eyes! 
Tact-san… You're not totally convinced yet!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Oh… I- I am ever so sorry! The more I think about it, the blurrier 
my image of what I should wear gets…

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no! Really? But I thought you picked Heart-san's 
outfit in a snap, bakushin-style!!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
I have a strong image of Heart-san, after all…! To me, she's like a great 
flower, blooming bold and proud…! But as much as I wish I could fit the 
vision of her in my head——

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
I need to be part of that vision if I want to act as her lead, but 
it just doesn't seem to click… I apologize for being so indecisive…

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Tact-chan…? 
……………

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
…Hey. If you're having trouble, do you mind waiting a sec? 
——Follow me, Bakushin O-chan!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
——Well, what do you think? 
I think it'll help give you some inspiration ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Mm! Please, go ahead and check out every angle! 
Feast your eyes on the fastest, toughest, and best outfits ever! 
Flight-san-designed and class representative-approved!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Whew! I can really tell this was designed by our school's top fashionista! The two of you look just like a sparkling aurora!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Truly…! The two of you look incredible… 
Hmm?

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Your brooches are both based on sakura and wings, but… 
Their designs are a little different.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you noticed! As you know, dates at the Droite give each 
other matching brooches. That's the tradition, at least. But!!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: We instead gave each other brooches that look like they match! Though of course, we made sure to get approval first!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text: Brooches that look like they match…? But what exactly does that mean?——

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… Well… 
There's a whole bunch of little details I could talk about with 
these outfits, but——

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text: The most important part is… Bakushin O-chan and I could only pull off these outfits because we're the two of us.
